description: Hazaragi/Central Asian Marker - diagnostic for the unique admixed populations of central Afghanistan and the Silk Road.
Central Asian Steppe Marker - diagnostic for the admixed populations of the Silk Road.
Steppe Ancestry Marker - essential for distinguishing the Siberian/Central Asian genetic component.
Seldin 128 Ancestry Informative Marker, informative for Central Asian populations such as the Hazara or Tajik groups.
Seldin 128 Ancestry Informative Marker for continental populations.
